findings.description: The hints for s1 are missing `ascSortId` and `descSortId`, which are key attributes of the `listSearchSortSubmit` tag used to map sort IDs to SQL `$sort` definitions. These are concrete property names a user would search for when implementing sort links.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example: `<nbs:listSearchSortSubmit ascSortId="1" descSortId="2" ... />` and `<nbs:listSearchSortSubmit ascSortId="3" descSortId="4" ... />`

findings.location: automated warning: Section count 2 < source headings 3
findings.description: The automated pre-check flagged a count mismatch, but the third 'heading' in the source is only a navigation anchor label (`.. _`using_composite_key`:`) followed by a horizontal rule with no content. Having 2 sections is correct. This warning is a false positive and does not represent an actual issue.
